name: pr-in-the-loop
description: Issue-first engineering workflow and PR planning skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Create Issues and plan reviewable PRs.
interface.longDescription: PR In The Loop packages issue-first development workflows for Codex. It can inspect repository and work-tool context, narrow ambiguous engineering work into one concrete GitHub Issue, and turn an existing Issue into human-reviewable PR plan documents split into minimum functional phases.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $pr-in-the-loop:open-issue to turn current work context into a GitHub Issue, then use $pr-in-the-loop:planning-pr to write reviewable PR plan documents.
